from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class Settings:
    database_url: str = "sqlite:///default.db"
    max_retries: int = 3
    smtp_host: str = "localhost"
    smtp_port: int = 587
    from_email: str = "noreply@example.com"
    redis_url: str = "redis://localhost:6379"
    cache_ttl: int = 300


class UserService:
    def __init__(self, settings: Settings):
        self.settings = settings

    def get_user(self, user_id: int) -> dict:
        return {"id": user_id, "db": self.settings.database_url, "retries": self.settings.max_retries}


class EmailService:
    def __init__(self, settings: Settings):
        self.settings = settings

    def send_welcome(self, user_email: str) -> None:
        print(f"Sending from {self.settings.from_email} via {self.settings.smtp_host}:{self.settings.smtp_port} to {user_email}")


class CacheService:
    def __init__(self, settings: Settings):
        self.settings = settings

    def get(self, key: str) -> str | None:
        return None
